commentaries.author: Aquinas Study Bible
commentaries.content: There will be a resurrection. Some will rise to glory, others to eternal shame. Will all persons rise at this time? It says that many will rise. The word for many is the odd Hebrew , which means the all who are many. (Fr. Most)

commentaries.author: Hippolytus of Rome
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And many of them that sleep in the dust of the earth shall awake, some to everlasting life, and some to shame and everlasting contempt. Hippolytus of Rome These shall awake to everlasting life. That is, those who have believed in the true life, and who have their names written in the book of life. And these to shame. That is, those who are attached to Antichrist, and who are cast with him into everlasting punishment.
